name: QA 1483
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1483

look for bad syslog entries



Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py centos-stream9-container reproduce

PCP QA Test No. 1483

look for bad syslog entries

Copyright (c) 2024 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py centos-stream9-container reproduce
statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1483.out.bad)
17a18,27
> Oct 10 19:22:56 f2e6c839d3db rc[701358]: pmpost: cannot open or create file "/var/log/pcp/NOTICES": Permission denied
> Oct 10 19:22:56 f2e6c839d3db rc[701358]: pmpost: unposted message: [Thu Oct 10 19:22:56 2024] stop pmlogger from /etc/pcp/pmlogger/rc
> Oct 10 19:23:16 f2e6c839d3db rc[703281]: pmpost: cannot open or create file "/var/log/pcp/NOTICES": Permission denied

Check local PMCD is still alive ...
